nasb.text: I will scatter you among the nations and I will disperse you through the lands, and I will consume your uncleanness from you.

esv.text: I will scatter you among the nations and disperse you through the countries, and I will consume your uncleanness out of you.

cnv.text: 我要把你分散在列國，四散在萬邦；我要從你中間消除你的污穢。

ccb.text: 我要把你驱散到列国，分散到列邦，我要除掉你的污秽。
